BlackHook
Table of Contents

Enum RenderCommandType

Namespace
ClaySharp.Interop
Assembly
BlackHook.ClaySharp.dll

Specifies the rendering operation command type emitted in the output render command array.

public enum RenderCommandType : byte

Fields

Border = 2

Draws a border outline around an area.

Custom = 7

Executes a custom user-defined drawing operation.

Image = 4

Draws a source image.

None = 0

A null command, does not render anything.

Rectangle = 1

Draws a filled rectangle with optional corner rounding.

ScissorEnd = 6

Disables clipping/scissor test, restoring the previous drawing area.

ScissorStart = 5

Enables clipping/scissor test using the command's bounding box.

Text = 3

Renders a run of text.
